## Verification checklist

- [ ] I have independently verified this address is malicious (not just suspicious)
- [ ] I have linked at least one external source confirming this
- [ ] This address is NOT in `known-good-contracts.json` or `known-good-contracts-solana.json`

---

*Zafu team reviews all submissions before adding to `malicious-confirmed.json`. False reports will be closed.*
